ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* The number of words in the article */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the article */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* The last date the article was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated article */,
  "bin" INTEGER /* Bin for grouping data points */,
  "bin_size" INTEGER /* Size of the bin used for time grouping */,
  "pageviews_median" REAL /* Median pageviews for the bin */,
  "pageviews_sum" REAL /* Total pageviews for the bin */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating the time period of the data */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* The number of unique visitors for the bin */,
  "average_pageviews" REAL /* The average pageviews per visitor for the bin */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* The bounce rate for the bin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_data_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the author */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the author account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last date the author account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last date the category was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last date the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the user (city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related article */,
  "total_pageviews" INTEGER /* Total pageviews for the article */,
  "average_time" REAL /* Average time spent on the article in seconds */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate calculated as a percentage */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* The number of times the article was shared */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* The number of likes the article received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* The number of dislikes the article received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* The number of comments on the article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the engagement metrics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commentary" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment for nested comments */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* The number of likes the comment received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* The number of dislikes the comment received */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the comment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commentary_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commentary_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated article */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last date the tag was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last date the notification was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
